title: Osun Host Minister Of Marine and Blue Economy
description: L-R: Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency, NIMASA, Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR; Honourable Minister of Marine and Blue Economy, Adegboyega Oyetola and Alh Yusuf Musa Dala durin
html: L-R: Director General, Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency, NIMASA, Dr Bashir Jamoh OFR; Honourable Minister of Marine and Blue Economy, Adegboyega Oyetola and Alh Yusuf Musa Dala during a reception in honour of the Honourable Minister by his community Osun State.
